DSDS 0.1
Overview Root Schema
accessibility artifact-reference example extensions guideline link metadata rich-text status usecase
anatomy api component design-specifications state variant
token
style
pattern

DSDS Component Definitions

Definitions for the composite component document.

Source: components/component.schema.json

componentDoc

Documentation for a single reusable UI component.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
namestringrequiredMachine-readable identifier (e.g., 'button', 'dialog', 'form-field', 'data-table').
Pattern: ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*$
displayNamestringrequiredHuman-readable name.
descriptionrichTextrequired
statusstatusrequired
aliasesstring[]optionalAlternative names this component is known by across teams, tools, or legacy systems (e.g., ['btn', 'action-button', 'CTA']). Useful for search, migration mapping, and cross-referencing when different disciplines use different terminology for the same component.
summarystringoptionalA one-line, plain-text summary. MUST NOT contain markup.
deprecationNoticestringoptionalRequired when status is 'deprecated'.
sincestringoptionalThe version in which this component was introduced.
tagsstring[]optionalFreeform keywords to relate guidelines across categories/disciplines (e.g., 'rtl', 'localization', 'validation').
categorystringoptionalComponent classification.
Pattern: ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*$
previewexample[]optionalVisual previews of the component.
anatomyanatomyoptional
apicomponentApi | map<string, componentApi>optionalThe code-level API. Single API object or platform-keyed map.
variantsvariant[]optionalNamed visual/behavioral configurations.
statesstate[]optionalInteractive states.
designSpecificationsdesignSpecificationsoptional
useCasesuseCasesoptional
guidelinesguideline[]optionalUsage guidelines for the component. Each entry is a self-contained guideline. Use the `category` property on individual guidelines to group by concern (e.g., 'design', 'accessibility', 'content').
accessibilityaccessibilityObjectoptional
linkslink[]optionalExternal resource links and related artifact references.
$extensionsextensionsoptional

Conditional: When status is "deprecated", then deprecationNotice is required.

References: richText, status, example, anatomy, componentApi, variant, state, designSpecifications, useCases, guideline, accessibilityObject, link, extensions
